info.name: EverCut - Authentication
info.description: Firebase-based authentication endpoints for customer and barber registration

body.raw:
{
  "shopName": "Elite Barber Shop",
  "shopOwner": "John Smith",
  "shopCategory": "Barber",
  "phoneNumber": "+1234567890",
  "emailId": "shop@example.com",
  "upiId": "shop@upi",
  "bio": "Premium barber services since 2010",
  "address": "456 Shop Street, New York, NY",
  "location": {
    "type": "Point",
    "coordinates": [-73.935242, 40.730610]
  },
  "numberOfEmployees": 5,
  "yearsOfExperience": 10,
  "facilities": ["WiFi", "AC", "Parking", "Card Payment"],
  "availableDays": ["Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"],
  "openTime": "09:00",
  "closeTime": "20:00",
  "breakTimes": [{"start": "13:00", "end": "14:00"}],
  "pin": "1234",
  "confirmPin": "1234"
}

request.description:
API health check endpoint to verify the server is running.

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "EverCut API is running",
  "timestamp": "2024-03-15T10:30:00.000Z"
}
